emails.theme: Welcome 1 of 3: The Cougar Paws Advantage
emails.product: Welcome / brand intro; delivers the 10% code
emails.shortDescription: Welcome flow email 1. Trailcampro-style layout: roofer-on-roof hero, warm welcome to the crew, 10% offer delivered in a bold banner high up (code WELCOME10), Why Cougar Paws grid, trust bar (since 1996, 500,000+ pros, 4.9/5, #1 in USA), Mike T. testimonial, Contact Us help block, full footer.
emails.notes: Trust signals verified on cougarpaws.com homepage stats bar (500k+ Professionals Served, 4.9/5, 28+ years). No hyphens/dashes, no pricing, no SKUs, never 'patented traction'. [NEEDS INFO] mailing address for footer + confirm code.
emails.creativeDirection: Rugged dark theme, orange #F26522. Transparent logo on dark, full-bleed roofer hero, ADVANTAGE headline, orange-bordered 10% banner with Claim 10% Off, 2x2 Why grid, 3-up trust bar, testimonial, Contact Us outline button, footer with socials + unsubscribe.

emails.theme: Welcome 2 of 3: Why pros trust Cougar Paws
emails.shortDescription: Welcome flow email 2. cbdMD-style numbered reasons list (grip for steep pitch, replaceable pad system, boot for every surface, built tough, trusted since 1996), plus a 3-step how-the-pad-system-works explainer, lifestyle boot-on-roof image, five-star Mike T. testimonial. Light 10% reminder, two CTAs max. Distinct layout from Email 1.
emails.notes: Pad system copy pulled from site FAQ (hook/loop, peel and replace). No hyphens/dashes, no pricing. Steel Walker II referenced as steel and metal roofs, not standing seam.
emails.offerCode: WELCOME10 (placeholder) — light reminder, offer still active
emails.creativeDirection: Dark theme, orange #F26522. Numbered reason rows with circular badges, 3-col STEP explainer cards, lifestyle boot image, star testimonial, Get A Grip Shop Now CTA, footer.

emails.theme: Welcome 3 of 3: Find your boot by roof type
emails.product: Category guide: metal, shingle, inspections, all-day
emails.shortDescription: Welcome flow email 3. Shoot United-style category education blocks (Metal Roofs / Shingle Roofs / Inspections & Estimating / All Day On The Job), each with image, short selling copy, and a shop button. Final last-call 10% nudge near the top. Distinct layout from Emails 1 and 2.
emails.notes: Metal = Steel Walker II magnetic (steel and metal roofs). Metal/shingle/inspections cards use product-page shots; all-day uses job-site lifestyle. Designer may swap white-bg cards for lifestyle crops. No hyphens/dashes, no pricing.
emails.offerCode: WELCOME10 (placeholder) — last call on the welcome 10%
emails.creativeDirection: Dark theme, orange #F26522. Orange-bordered last-call banner up top, four full-width category cards (image + orange label + copy + shop button), closing line, Shop Now CTA, footer.

emails.theme: Website Signup Popup: 10% off + join the list
emails.product: Email capture popup (entry point to the welcome flow)
emails.shortDescription: Website popup with an email field and the 10% offer in the headline. Sells the list: exclusive offers plus first word on new arrivals. Subscribing enrolls the person in the 3 email welcome flow. A/B layout variants (split image+form, full image bg). Success state welcomes them and points to their inbox; the code is NOT shown on screen, it arrives in Welcome Email 1.
emails.notes: Popup, not an email. Trigger ~5s/40% scroll desktop, exit intent mobile; suppress on cart/checkout. Submit adds email to ESP Welcome Flow list which fires Emails 1 to 3. [NEEDS INFO] confirm discount code (placeholder WELCOME10) + any minimum/exclusions.
emails.offerCode: WELCOME10 (placeholder, confirm) — delivered by email only, not shown on success state
emails.creativeDirection: Rugged dark theme, orange #F26522 accent. Offer-led headline GET 10% OFF YOUR FIRST PAIR, eyebrow Join The Crew, email field + Claim 10% Off button, proof line (since 1996, 4.9/5), success = You're in. Welcome to the crew.

emails.theme: The Performer Boot: the boot that keeps its cool
emails.shortDescription: Single-product spotlight on the Performer Boot with a summer heat angle. Rev2 (client Jul 15): product name in the headline (THE PERFORMER KEEPS ITS COOL), Shop the Performer CTA in the first half under the hero intro, and the redundant post-headline description removed (specs live once, in the feature grid). Flow: hero headline + cooling hook + first-half CTA, product shot, 2x2 feature grid (thermally cooler, soft flexible leather, adjustable strap, replaceable Peak Line pads), detail image, Proudly Made in the USA band, fit tip (order two sizes down), trust bar, Mike T. brand testimonial, closing CTA, footer. Distinct dark layout, no offer/code on this send.
emails.notes: Client brief (Slack, Jul 15): 'write an email on PERFORMER BOOT for july 16th.' All facts verified from cougarpaws.com/products/performer-boot (6 inch soft leather upper, adjustable strap, thermally designed to run cooler, Peak Line replacement pads, Made in USA, sizing runs large order two down). Images verified 200: Preformer.jpg, Pre1.jpg. No hyphens/dashes, no pricing, no SKUs, never 'patented traction'. No offer code specified by client. [NEEDS INFO] mailing address for footer.
emails.creativeDirection: Rugged dark theme, orange #F26522. KEEP YOUR COOL headline, full-bleed Performer product hero, THE PERFORMER name + Shop the Performer button, 2x2 feature grid, detail image, Made in USA band, orange-bordered fit tip, 3-up trust bar, italic testimonial, closing CTA, footer with socials + unsubscribe.

emails.theme: The Steel Walker II: magnetic grip for metal roofs
emails.shortDescription: Single-product spotlight on the Steel Walker II magnetic boot for steel and metal roofs. Distinct layout from the Jul 16 Performer: full-bleed hero, product name in the headline (THE STEEL WALKER II) + Shop CTA in the first half, a 3-part HOW IT HOLDS THE METAL row (powerful magnets, softer rubber sole, enhanced tread), two alternating image+copy feature rows (moisture wicking lining + triple ply cushioning; configurations Strap Only / Composition Toe / Composition Toe and Strap with safety toe), brief Cougar Paws Covers care tip, trust stat bar, closing CTA, footer. Performer learnings applied.
emails.notes: Client brief (Slack, Jul 16): promote Steel Walker II, Magnetic Roofing Boots for Metal Roofs. All facts verified from cougarpaws.com/products/the-steelwalker-ii (magnets + softer rubber sole + enhanced tread; moisture wicking lining; triple ply cushioning; Strap Only / Composition Toe / Composition Toe and Strap; pair with Cougar Paws Covers on the ground). Images verified 200: DSCF31891-Edit.png, SW2.jpg, KWP-00128.png. Rules: no hyphens/dashes (moisture wicking, triple ply, all day), no pricing, no SKU/patent/ASTM numbers in copy, never 'patented traction', 'steel and metal roofs' not 'standing seam'. No fit/sizing box, no generic testimonial (per Performer feedback). No offer code specified. [NEEDS INFO] mailing address for footer.
emails.creativeDirection: Rugged dark theme, orange #F26522. Full-bleed hero, THE STEEL WALKER II headline + Shop the Steel Walker II button up top, 3 numbered circles for the grip mechanism, two alternating image/copy rows, small care tip line, 3-up trust bar, closing CTA, footer with socials + unsubscribe.
